name_en: [Chip Version] Model M46203 CarryAll Small Handbag, crafted from Monogram canvas with leather trim, creating a perfect companion for city life. Features a spacious layout with a neat interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap. Dimensions: 29 x 24 x 12 cm
